{
  "packet_id": "module__simple_pwm__cycle_model",
  "todo_plan_sha256": "97147a83467339f3d8bdf10370e6366a4b8a3eeca0cb4ad8bac3bf660a00d118",
  "owner_module": "simple_pwm",
  "owner_file": "rtl/simple_pwm.sv",
  "implemented_cycle_model_refs": [
    "cycle_model.clock",
    "cycle_model.reset",
    "cycle_model.latency",
    "cycle_model.handshake_rules.pwm_out",
    "cycle_model.pipeline.S0_COUNTER_UPDATE",
    "cycle_model.pipeline.S1_COMPARE_OUTPUT",
    "cycle_model.ordering.ordering_rule_0",
    "cycle_model.observability.observability_signal_0",
    "cycle_model.observability.observability_signal_1"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Latency-1 behavior is implemented by updating counter and pwm_out on the same rising edge.",
    "pwm_out is forced low when enable=0 and during reset.",
    "counter is held/reset to zero when enable=0 and wraps to zero at period boundary."
  ]
}
